text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing my training session with Mejiro
Palmer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Practice's over already?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Huh, I guess that really is it for today... That's a
wrap, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Not sure, actually. Nothing's wrong with me,
technically, but like...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I still feel all antsy and stuff, even after running so
much. I guess I just wanna keep going.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But, it's all good. I don't wanna mess up our
schedule, so let's call it a da—

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waaaheeeeey! ☆☆☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
The vibes are immaculate right now, y'all! Time to
get the party started!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You were pretty hyped up earlier, but you're still
bouncing off the walls, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That's so like you. But hey, if you're feeling
up for it, why stop, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Like honestly, I'm feeling up for another lap or ten too.
choice_data_list: Why not? Go out there and run some more!
Why not? Go out there and run some more!

Let's try to find another way to help you blow
off that energy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Like honestly, I'm feeling up for another lap or ten too.
choice_data_list: Why not? Go out there and run some more!
Why not? Go out there and run some more!

Let's try to find another way to help you blow
off that energy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, are you giving me the okay? I'm seriously
gonna go, then!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Time to match Helios's energy and get
some running done!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Get hyped with me, Trainer! Lemme hear you say
it now! Waaahey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ready or not! Here we gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the nearly empty racetrack starts
overflowing with their unparalleled energy as
evening settles in.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess that's the more logical route. Welp,
guess I'll hold back on my emotions and go with
logic for today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But, like, how exactly am I supposed to get all
this energy out? Should I party it up or
something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, all right, then. And since you're the one who
suggested it, I'm gonna guess you're tagging
along, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. Curfew's just around the corner, so we
won't be out for long. C'mon, let's go make every
minute of this outing count!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Palmer and I head out to paint
the town red!
